reviews.text: Highly recommend. Made me feel comfortable the minute I walked in the door for my first appointment. The process is fast, they thoroughly explain what they aim to provide and answer questions and concerns. I look forward to continue my physical wellness journey with the staff.

reviews.name: places/ChIJl5WjafhryYcRhh2nRHTFfeE/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtc2VqOU1nEAE
reviews.text: I’ve been a patient at LTC for 5 straight years. Throughout my time as a client, I’ve been serviced at 12 different centers. This one is by far my favorite center to go to because of how friendly the staff are. The doctor in particular is great, she is funny, and she jokes around with the patients, making it a very laid back and fun environment. At the same time, she is very professional and great at her job. As for the rest of the staff, they are also incredible. This center deserves five stars. If you are thinking about getting treatment and I’m not sure where to go, give this place a chance. They take customer service very seriously

reviews.name: places/ChIJl5WjafhryYcRhh2nRHTFfeE/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtak11bm13RRAB
reviews.text:
The only reason I'm giving two stars is because the Fayetteville staff is great.  However the mail order service Low T uses is absolutely the worst.  The shipments never happen when they are supposed to.  I'm several days past due for a shot already with no communication from them on when the shipment will happen.

It's been a problem ever since I switched to mail order but the local office would make up for it by providing a courtesy shot.  Those courtesy shots are now an extra $70.

Been going here for years but they just lost my business.  There are too many other places that offer this service for me to put up with the terrible mail order service.

reviews.text: Maverick Male Medical Clinic has been a game-changer! Dr. Gentry and his team truly care, taking time to listen, explain treatments, and involve patients in decisions.  Their expertise and personalized care help with weight control, energy, and overall health making me feel decades younger.  With consistent, professional care from staff like Dana, Marlina, and Kayla I always feel well taken care of. Dr. Gentry’s honesty is refreshing. Highly recommend this clinic for anyone seeking life-changing results!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ4-5XXqpryYcRetMmz1YMvyc/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR2d3RXRkFnEAE
reviews.text: Coming into the clinic for the first time I was a little nervous and didn’t know what to except. Being 50 and 85lbs overweight, diabetic and so tired all the time,  I was sure low T was not going to be the issue, but was willing to try. First walking in and meeting Marlena (AKA gate keeper) she put me at ease. Once getting back in the room to start testing with Dr. Gentry and Alexis asking me all the questions, it was clear they would be able to help.  Next appointment was with Dana, where she made adjustments to help get things balanced out. I continue to come in and get checkups with Eber where he does a great job keeping up with routine questions and following up with how I’m feeling. I am down  89 lbs and did not feel this good in all my 40’s. Big thanks to the hole team!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ4-5XXqpryYcRetMmz1YMvyc/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ2dzVLR1NBEAE
reviews.text:
Dr. Gentry and his staff were wonderful. They took the time to listen to my concerns and issues I was having. They walked me through treatment options and allowed me to be an integral part of the decision making. I appreciated the way Dr. Gentry speaks to his patients - he uses a manner that is easy to understand, but he also teaches and allows you to follow along in the process. Wait time was minimal, which is very unusual at this time in the medical arena. Everyone was welcoming and polite and happy to answer questions and/or offer guidance. I would definitely recommend Maverick Medical to anyone searching for a new provider or Doctor’s Office.
-Andrew Mikles

reviews.name: places/ChIJ4-5XXqpryYcRetMmz1YMvyc/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURubl8zNTB3RRAB
reviews.text:
These guys have changed my life for the better. I don’t say this lightly.

I’m very active, played sports and lifted most of my life. I’m now in my 50s and I’m stronger than I’ve ever been and I’m back to playing sports again!

The staff is so friendly, Marlena greets me each week, Eber and Dana take care of all my needs. Dr Gentry is very knowledgeable and keeps me on the right course!

They offer a lot of services, everything from regenerative medicines (exosomes) to sexual performance to TRT therapies.  All these therapies are cheaper than what Inwould pay at other places too!

I send all my friends here. I highly recommend them!

I’ve been going to Elite Man’s Health for my TRT and blood work, and I couldn’t be more satisfied. The clinic is professional, efficient, and genuinely cares about your health and progress. The staff is knowledgeable and always takes the time to answer questions or explain results in detail.

From my first visit, everything has been smooth — from scheduling to lab work to treatment adjustments. I’ve noticed real improvements in my energy, mood, and overall well-being since starting TRT with them.

If you’re looking for a place that takes men’s health seriously and provides excellent care, I highly recommend Elite Man’s Health.

reviews.name: places/ChIJn1PVHTsp1IcR-WeUnPZlTdw/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNwdUxmT1Z3EAE
reviews.text: I highly recommend.  The receptionist is extremely polite and regularly knows patients by their first name, which is astonishing given the sheer volume of individuals walking through the front door.  The clinical staff on duty always greet patients with a smile and are extremely helpful when asking any questions.  It truly is a service with a smile.  In particularly, Sarah is extremely knowledgeable and is willing to go above and beyond for her patients.  If she doesn't have an answer right away to questions related to your health, she finds one.  I have never failed to receive a call back when leaving a message, and it has always been in a timely manner.  As a team, their customer service is top notch!  Wait times are short, but their care and attention to each patient is never rushed.  It shows why my wife and I have both been patients for years!

reviews.name: places/ChIJn1PVHTsp1IcR-WeUnPZlTdw/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURGcWUzalhnEAE
reviews.text: VERY DISHONEST “medical facility.” It’s been bothering me for months and I feel it’s important to warn others. The owner evidently thinks this is a local bakery shop or a nail salon, as they charge you an extra 4% if you pay with card (debit or credit). Could it be to avoid taxes as they also bill insurance in addition to charging a $150 fee if you get a prescription? (See attached image). This place is not run like a medical office. It’s run like a shady med spa with exorbitant and predatory practices. Find a primary care or endocrinologist and save yourself time and money. Alison is in charge of their billing codes. She’s very rude on the phone and not knowledgeable. We were billed $622 for basic labs. I’m looking into this and ensuring it’s not fraudulent activity. Stay far away from this place. It’s criminal what they’re doing. They also give injections via cash pay that don’t require any type of medical assessment ahead of time, potentially putting your health at great risk and interacting with other medications you’re on. Nothing “elite” about this place. Scummy is a better way to describe it.

reviews.text: I have been a patient of Dr. Pinto's for quite a few years. Every since Dr. Kahn left, in fact. Through the years, I have lost Dr. Kahn, Dr. Ali, Dr. Moursi and Dr. Shelton. We  all love her, patients and staff alike.

reviews.text: I have been associated with the Elder Care Clinic for a long time. My father and then my mother in law were patients there in the early 2000s and now my husband and I are also patients. reviews.text: I’ve been seeing Adrienne for about 2 years now and she’s truly changed my life. I have very small lips naturally and overtime she’s been able to give me my dream lips! I appreciate her approach for keeping you natural looking, and she had me dissolve my old filler and start over the first time I saw her. I love that she will respectfully tell you no if you don’t actually need something done!  I’ve received a few other services here and everyone is so nice and makes you feel welcome. I’ve been in for filler and Adrienne took the time to help me with my terrible seb derm skin issues as well. I drive an hour to Voxy and would drive even further if I had to! Voxy has given me the best glow up and confidence boost. The Voxy VIP is a genius membership plan that I highly recommend! The new building it’s beautiful and in a convenient spot!

reviews.name: places/ChIJv0P-I_QRyYcR60WJRnuC0fo/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xaTk5XeFRhbkpJWkcxVlVIUm9OamhZVUhsaGVtYxAB
reviews.text: I've had such a great experience at this place! The service is top-notch from start to finish. The staff are warm, professional, and incredibly knowledgeable—they take the time to explain every step and make me feel completely at ease. My eyebrows look amazing: natural and beautifully shaped. The laser and Botox treatments were gentle yet effective, and I could see a noticeable difference right away. I really appreciated how clean and calming the space was, too. Highly recommend for anyone looking for expert care and stunning results!
